name: @spiny-wheely/tests
description: spinyWheely test suite — unit, API, e2e, load

scripts.test:load:smoke: LOAD_CONCURRENCY=20 LOAD_WHEEL_WORKERS=10 LOAD_DURATION_SEC=5 LOAD_WARMUP_SEC=1 node load/run-load.mjs
scripts.test:load:heavy: LOAD_CONCURRENCY=200 LOAD_WHEEL_WORKERS=80 LOAD_DURATION_SEC=60 LOAD_WARMUP_SEC=5 node load/run-load.mjs
